segments.text: Make a joyful noise to God, all the earth;
Sing the glory of his name; give to him glorious praise!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: all the earth: Heb. all the earth

segments.text: Say to God,
How awesome are your deeds! So great is your power that your enemies come cringing to you.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: All the earth worships you and sings praises to you;
they sing praises to your name.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: submit: or, yield feigned obedience: Heb. lie

segments.text: Come and see what God has done: he is awesome in his deeds toward the children of man.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He turned the sea into dry land; they passed through the river on foot. There did we rejoice in him,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: who rules by his might forever, whose eyes keep watch on the nations— let not the rebellious exalt themselves.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Bless our God, O peoples; let the sound of his praise be heard,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: who has kept our soul among the living and has not let our feet slip.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For you, O God, have tested us; you have tried us as silver is tried.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You brought us into the net; you laid a crushing burden on our backs;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: you let men ride over our heads; we went through fire and through water; yet you have brought us out to a place of abundance.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will come into your house with burnt offerings; I will perform my vows to you,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: that which my lips uttered and my mouth promised when I was in trouble.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will offer to you burnt offerings of fat animals, with the smoke of the sacrifice of rams; I will make an offering of bulls and goats.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Come and hear, all you who fear God, and I will tell what he has done for my soul.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I cried to him with my mouth, and high praise was on my tongue.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: If I had cherished iniquity in my heart, the Lord would not have listened.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: But truly God has listened; he has attended to the voice of my prayer.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Blessed be God, because he has not rejected my prayer or removed his steadfast love from me!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Blessed be God!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
